prestazioni: 426 Hemi (A102) engine block sleeved to 4.50" bore with forged Mahle pistons (12.5:1 compression), Crower billet crankshaft (4.25" stroke), and Manley H-beam connecting rods for 520ci displacement, paired with a custom camshaft by Comp Cams (280°/286° duration, .650" lift) and solid roller lifters

Holley Dominator 1250 CFM carburetor with billet metering blocks, custom jetting (primary: #88, secondary: #96), and a Wilson Manifolds dual-plane intake manifold port-matched to the heads, fed by a NOS Big Shot nitrous system (250hp shot) with a progressive controller

Tremec TKO-600 5-speed manual transmission with a McLeod twin-disc clutch (RST 10.5" diaphragm) and a 4.10:1 Detroit Locker rear differential, paired with a Driveshaft Shop aluminum driveshaft and Strange Engineering 35-spline axles
estetica: Custom 3-piece fiberglass nose cone by Legendary Auto Interiors, reshaped for a 3° lower rake and fitted with a functional NACA duct for brake cooling, painted in PPG Hemi Orange with clear-coated metallic flakes

Rear wing modified with a carbon fiber underbody diffuser by APR Performance (Superbird-specific mounting points), adjustable in 5° increments, and reinforced with billet aluminum uprights from Billet Specialties

Fully restored and reupholstered interior with Recaro SRD seats (Hemi Orange Alcantara with black leather bolsters), a custom roll cage by Autopower (4-point, bolt-in, chromoly), and a Momo Prototipo steering wheel on a NRG quick-release hub
